text:
この依頼を出すにあたり
真っ先にキミの顔が思い浮かんだよ。

この難しい調査を頼めるのは
キミをおいて他に考えられない。

キミなら必ずやり遂げてくれると
信じている。どうか全力を尽くして
科学の発展に寄与し

Yours was the first face that came to mind
when I considered potential applicants.

You're the only person I could think of to help
with a survey this challenging.

I'm sure you'll be able to see it through.
Please invest your efforts fully.
This is for　the sake of science.
